2606.26078.title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
2606.26078.paper_summary: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.
2606.26078.paper_summary_zh: 監督式深度學習已被廣泛應用於焊接滲透狀態分類；然而，在領域轉移下，其性能往往會顯著下降，例如在具有不同物理機制的焊接過程之間轉移模型：例如，從以弧為主的鎢惰性氣體（TIG）焊接轉移到基於鑽孔的激光焊接。為克服這一限制，我們提出了一種與漸進式源領域擴展（GSDE）策略相結合的無監督領域適應（UDA）框架。在專門的TIG和激光焊接數據集上進行評估，我們的方法在同一過程和跨過程轉移任務中均達到了高準確率。具體而言，在同一過程設置中，它在TIGFH上達到90.65%的平均準確率，在LSPS上達到90.72%，分別超過了監督基線35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨過程場景中，它在TIG到激光的轉移中達到80.48%，在激光到TIG的轉移中達到81.13%，分別改善了基線43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可視化驗證了模型學習到的領域不變特徵，同時保持了區分性類別邊界。這種方法顯著降低了新焊接過程的重新標記成本，並增強了在不同焊接系統中智能監控的多樣性。
2606.26078.author: Sen Li et.al.
2606.26078.authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
